actions.name: Coin Toss
actions.description:
Effect: Roll 1d6 and flip a coin. On a heads the target is inflicted with the corresponding Affliction for 5 Activations, and on Tails both the user and target are inflicted with corresponding Affliction for 5 Activations.

  1. @Affliction[burn]
  2. @Affliction[drowsy]
  3. @Affliction[frostbite]
  4. @Affliction[paralysis]
  5. @Affliction[poison]
  6. @Affliction[splinter]
